cases.prompt: Show top 5 customers by total order value
cases.expected_sql: SELECT customer_id, SUM(total_amount) AS total_value FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id ORDER BY total_value DESC LIMIT 5
cases.predicted_sql: SELECT customer_id, SUM(total_amount) AS total_value FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id ORDER BY total_value DESC LIMIT 5

cases.prompt: What is daily revenue for the last 30 days?
cases.expected_sql: SELECT DATE(created_at) AS day, SUM(total_amount) AS revenue FROM orders WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY day
cases.predicted_sql: SELECT DATE(created_at) AS day, SUM(total_amount) AS revenue FROM orders WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY day
